# anthropic_external_key (Data Source)

Fetches a single CMEK external key by ID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_external_key" "prod" {
  id = "ekey_01SDCCSbTxrXDpWc1phhtcfK"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `display_name` (String)
- `geo` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `provider_config` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provider_config))
- `updated_at` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--provider_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provider_config`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String)
- `key_name` (String)
- `kms_arn` (String)
- `region` (String)
- `role_arn` (String)
- `tenant_id` (String)
- `type` (String)
- `vault_uri` (String)
